title: backend: Config: Add a testcase for Headlamp kubeconfig paths.
author: nikunjkumar05

findings.description: Trailing period in commit subject 'backend: config: Add a testcase for Headlamp kubeconfig paths.' — remove the period.
#NAN placeholder still present in Related Issue field; replace with a real issue number or N/A.
Branch still contains a merge commit — please rebase to linearise history.
Test now uses assert.Equal with exact per-OS paths (including macOS Library/Application Support) — substantially stronger than the old HasPrefix check.
